# `polars selector boolean` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Select all boolean columns.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector boolean {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input | output          |
| ----- | --------------- |
| any   | polars_selector |
## Examples

Select all boolean columns
```nu
> {
    "name": ["Alice", "Bob"],
    "active": [true, false],
    "score": [1, 2],
} |
polars into-df --as-columns |
polars select (polars selector boolean) |
polars collect
╭───┬────────╮
│ # │ active │
├───┼────────┤
│ 0 │ true   │
│ 1 │ false  │
╰───┴────────╯

```
